category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and air conditioners with heat pump mode exported from China to Malaysia

title.en: China-to-Malaysia Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Malaysia's SIRIM mandatory product certification (MS/IEC 60335-2-40), Suruhanjaya Tenaga (ST) mandatory energy label and MEPS requirements, MESTECC/DOE refrigerant and ODS controls, and related market obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与马来西亚SIRIM强制产品认证（MS/IEC 60335-2-40）、苏汉嘉亚腾纳（ST）强制能效标签及MEPS要求、MESTECC/DOE制冷剂及消耗臭氧层物质管控及相关市场义务的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與馬來西亞SIRIM強制產品認證（MS/IEC 60335-2-40）、蘇漢嘉亞騰納（ST）強制能效標籤及MEPS要求、MESTECC/DOE製冷劑及消耗臭氧層物質管控及相關市場義務的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, registered conformity assessment body decision, SIRIM filing, ST MEPS registration, DOE ODS permit determination, customs determination, installation approval, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current SIRIM scope, ST energy label categories, DOE refrigerant permit requirements, MS standard editions, voltage and grid compatibility, and Bahasa Malaysia labelling requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、注册符合性评定机构决定、SIRIM申报、ST MEPS注册、DOE ODS许可裁定、海关裁定、安装批准或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行SIRIM适用范围、ST能效标签品类、DOE制冷剂许可要求、MS标准版本、电压及电网兼容性及马来西亚语标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、註冊符合性評定機構決定、SIRIM申報、ST MEPS註冊、DOE ODS許可裁定、海關裁定、安裝批准或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SIRIM適用範圍、ST能效標籤品類、DOE製冷劑許可要求、MS標準版本、電壓及電網相容性及馬來西亞語標籤要求。

answer_first.en: SIRIM mandatory product certification (MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40 safety), ST mandatory energy label and MEPS registration (minimum EER), DOE/MESTECC ODS and refrigerant licensing (R-22 import restrictions, R-32 preferred), and voltage adaptation from CN 220 V to MY 240 V are the major Malaysia compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. CCC is not recognised.
answer_first.zh: SIRIM强制产品认证（MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40安全）、ST强制能效标签及MEPS注册（最低EER）、DOE/MESTECC消耗臭氧层物质及制冷剂许可（R-22进口限制，R-32为首选）以及电压适配（中国220V→马来西亚240V）是中国空气源热泵进入马来西亚的主要合规差距。CCC认证不被承认。
answer_first.zht: SIRIM強制產品認證（MS 1062 / IEC 60335-2-40安全）、ST強制能效標籤及MEPS註冊（最低EER）、DOE/MESTECC消耗臭氧層物質及製冷劑許可（R-22進口限制，R-32為首選）以及電壓適配（中國220V→馬來西亞240V）是中國空氣源熱泵進入馬來西亞的主要合規差距。CCC認證不被承認。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
